_comment: Family glossary — the shared control point for corrections. `places` is keyed by the slug of a stop's normalized_name (same key 09_geocode uses) and overrides geocoding. `names` are verbatim-text substitutions applied to visible strings at assemble/moments time. Seeded from family feedback (2026-06); extend by promoting `suggestions/` items here.

home.name: 86 Westfield Road, Edgbaston
home.note: Family home — start & end of every trip (Peter/William).

birmingham-uk.name: 86 Westfield Road, Edgbaston
birmingham-uk.note: Home (B15 3JG) — replaces the Birmingham city-centre anchor.

dinas-camp-near-harlech-wales.name: Dinas Farm, Llanbedr
dinas-camp-near-harlech-wales.note: Simon: the family's Welsh campsite, inland from Llanbedr (not the common Dinas hamlet).

kate-jamie-s-farm.name: Brook House Farm, Avenbury
kate-jamie-s-farm.note: Simon/John: Kate & Jamie's farm = Brook House Farm, Avenbury (Bromyard).

names.note: John's partner — diary spelt 'Kaz', transcribed inconsistently as 'Kay'.
